race.comment: One for the babies. MURKADO (1) looked good placing over this course and distance on debut before breaking the maiden status at the Sunny Coast last time out. Will have derived a bunch of confidence from that victory and can go right on with the job now. THE THORNCASTER (4) is drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley and Maloney sticks in the irons following that last-start placing here. Should be hitting the line with gusto. MOMOKA (9) hit the frame here on debut and will have come on with that run now in the locker. Top-three conveyance. BRUMAL (2) gets some weight off with the 1.5kg claim and shouldn't be discounted lightly. KICKUP ROCKY (3) next best despite the outside draw.
